regions.text: Cameras and eyes both form upside-down pictures. (Diagrams: Camera and eye showing inverted images of a person).
Light reaching the eye is physical. But in the retina, chemical changes happen, similar to how film records photos.
(Illustration: A roll of film). These chemical changes cause even more complex changes in the retina's living cells.
film: material for taking photos. cause: to make something happen. FUTURE: will cause. PRESENT: cause(s). PAST: caused.
